parser_strategy.pdf: Use PyMuPDF/pypdf text extraction first; queue OCR only for low-text or image-heavy PDFs flagged by discovery.
parser_strategy.presentations: Extract slide text and speaker notes; retain slide-level provenance. Treat slide images as visual evidence only if multimodal indexing is approved.
parser_strategy.word_documents: Extract body text and core properties; use as metadata/supporting material rather than primary thesis text when a full thesis PDF exists.
parser_strategy.video: Store metadata and links in v1. Do not index video content unless transcripts or a user-approved transcription path is added.

recommendations.chunking: Chunk primary thesis/report PDFs by structural headings when available, otherwise by page windows with overlap; keep posters, proposals, and presentations as short supporting chunks with explicit document_type.
recommendations.retrieval: Use Qdrant hybrid dense+sparse retrieval with RRF. Add payload indexes for project_slug, document_type, language, year, and ocr_required after approval.
recommendations.embedding_recommendation: Evaluate Gemini Embedding 2 Preview for multimodal/visual coverage; use gemini-embedding-001 only if OCR/text extraction is approved as sufficient.
